title: I Built the Healthiest House to Live to 120

chunks.title: Introduction and House Tour
chunks.summary: The host introduces viewers to his home in Costa Rica, discussing the beautiful view and the concept behind the design of the house as a healthier living environment.

chunks.title: Outdoor Gym and Health Benefits
chunks.summary: The host showcases his outdoor gym, emphasizing the importance of outdoor workouts. He discusses the benefits of getting natural light, particularly infrared light, for overall health.
